headline: 20-Year Carry-Forward Tax Credit Management Preparation Checklist — Reno
articleBody:
20-Year Carry-Forward Tax Credit Management Preparation Checklist for Reno Clients

Before your 20-Year Carry-Forward Tax Credit Management appointment with FICA Tax Credits & Refunds, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact FICA Tax Credits & Refunds at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
